name: PP-野牛 | 碳素纤维
descriptionEn: The Bizon SMG is low-damage, but offers a uniquely designed high-capacity drum magazine that reloads quickly. It has been painted using a carbon fiber hydrographic over a graphite base coat. Just because I carried my team doesn't mean it wasn't a team effort - Rona Sabri, Rising Star
descriptionZh: 野牛微型冲锋枪造成的伤害虽然较低，但它具有设计独特的高容量弹鼓，可以快速换弹。 这把武器以石墨为外表，然后使用碳素纤维的花纹进行了涂装。 虽因我独当一面，但不意味着这不是团队的功劳 - 明日之星罗纳.萨布里
